title: ARCHIVED - Alberta - 2021 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Alberta - 2021 Income tax package
The following forms and schedules can be used to help you complete your tax return.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Alberta tax Form AB428 - Alberta Tax and Credits Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes and credits to report on your return Optional: Alberta Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet AB428 - Alberta Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Alberta tax and credits

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes
- Optional: Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Federal Income Tax and Benefit Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Form AB428 - Alberta Tax and Credits Use this form to calculate your provincial taxes and credits to report on your return
- Optional: Alberta Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules Worksheet AB428 - Alberta Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Alberta tax and credits
- Alberta Information Guide Use this guide with the instructions on the return and schedules
- Worksheet AB428 - Alberta Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts for your Alberta tax and credits
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Schedule 14 - Climate Action Incentive Alberta Schedule AB(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule AB(S11) - Alberta Tuition and Education Amounts

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses)
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition, Education, and Textbook Amounts and Canada Training Credit
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Schedule 14 - Climate Action Incentive
- Schedule AB(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule AB(S11) - Alberta Tuition and Education Amounts

									(electronic filing) Authorize a representative Community volunteer tax clinic Discounter (tax preparer)
